nasb.text: Caleb drove out from there the three sons of Anak: Sheshai and Ahiman and Talmai, the children of Anak.

esv.text: And Caleb drove out from there the three sons of Anak, Sheshai and Ahiman and Talmai, the descendants of Anak.

cnv.text: 迦勒把亞衲人的三個子孫，就是示篩、亞希幔、撻買，從那裡趕出去；他們是亞衲人的後代。

ccb.text: 迦勒赶走了住在那里的亚衲族的三个族长，即示筛、亚希幔和挞买，
